description: Triggers when the user wants to create or optimize popups, modals, overlays, exit intent, or lead capture banners for conversion purposes
should_trigger: I need to add an exit intent popup to reduce cart abandonment on my e-commerce site
How do I create an email capture popup that converts at 5%?
Design a lead magnet popup for my B2B SaaS landing page
My modal overlay is showing too early and annoying visitors — how do I fix the timing?
What's the best scroll-based trigger for a newsletter popup on a blog?
Create an announcement banner for a limited-time promotion
I want to add a slide-in popup that doesn't block content on mobile
should_not_trigger: How do I optimize my contact form conversion rate?
Improve the CTA button on my pricing page
Add a cookie consent banner (GDPR compliance)
